name: get_salesorder_for_sap_self
title: get_SalesOrder_for_sap_self
description: Retrieve a single entity by its key from the SalesOrder collection in the sap_self service. Provide the key property value(s) to identify the specific entity to retrieve. Supports OData query options for selecting specific properties ($select), expanding related entities ($expand). If the structure of the entity is not known, call get_metadata_sap_self tool first to get the metadata.

select.title: select
select.description: OData $select query option. Specify a comma-separated list of property names to include in the response.

expand.title: expand
expand.description: OData $expand query option to include related entities in the response.
